title: piper inaequale var. inaequale
intro: Piper inaequale var. inaequale is a variant of the Piper inaequale plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae. It is also known as the Indian long pepper or long pepper, and is a type of spice used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Piper inaequale var. inaequale include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory problems, and is also used to aid digestion and relieve pain.
